The Crossing

The distance between
you and paradise
is ten hours.

Depart from a private terminal — Farnborough, Le Bourget, wherever you are. No queues. No check-in. No strangers. Flat beds, a curated cellar, and a crew whose only task is you.

The Arrival

Mahé receives you the way all great destinations do — slowly, warmly, without rush.

Step off the aircraft. Warm air. The scent of frangipani. A transfer already waiting. Your villa has been ready since morning.

Runway to Villa
The Journey, Composed

For honeymoons, family escapes, celebratory weekends, and multi-island charters alike.

Your itinerary should feel like desire in motion, not logistics in sequence.

We shape every trip around a mood: the anticipation before touchdown, the calm of a ready arrival, the beauty of moving on at exactly the right moment, and the quiet ease of knowing the next scene is already set.

Flexible By Design

Any island. Any sequence. One uninterrupted feeling.

Start with a single immaculate arrival, stretch into a slow island circuit, or layer villas, marinas, and air transfers into something more cinematic. The route changes to fit the trip. The emotional rhythm stays seamless.

Jet arrivals Villa access Yacht handoffs Inter-island air
Anticipation Before touchdown, the stay already feels underway.

Timing, permissions, and onward movement are quietly locked before you arrive.

Flow Every handoff feels like a continuation, never an interruption.

Runway, launch, car, villa, and departure lounge read as one composed gesture.

Freedom The plan holds so lightly it feels like spontaneity.

Enough structure to feel effortless, enough freedom to feel entirely your own.

01
Opening Move

Land into anticipation, not admin.

The runway arrival, customs flow, and onward transfer read as one elegant gesture, so the very first emotional note is relief, not process.

Runway reception Customs cleared Villa or marina ready
02
Settling In

The stay opens exactly at the pace you wanted.

A honeymoon can soften. A family trip can stay fluid. A short celebratory escape can feel immediate. The schedule supports the mood instead of dictating it.

Private check-in Dining held Time protected
03
Changing Scene

The transfer becomes part of the seduction.

Helicopter, launch, light aircraft, or car: we turn the in-between into atmosphere, so moving islands feels like the story deepening rather than pausing.

Air or sea leg Window matched No rushed handoff
04
Finale

Even leaving can feel beautifully unhurried.

Because the return was considered from the beginning, the final morning keeps its calm. No scrambling. No visible machinery. Just a soft close to the trip.

Aircraft prepared Departure timed Calm final morning
Composed Around You

No two journeys should follow the same line. They should all arrive with the same ease.

Stretch it into a slow island disappearance, tighten it into a polished celebratory weekend, or build a multi-stop charter with a different mood at every turn. The routing changes completely. The feeling never breaks.

One-island escape Multi-stop charter Yacht pairing Villa circuit
What We Hold

What you are really buying is not a route map. It is the removal of friction from every important handoff.

Timing

Aircraft, resort, villa, marina, and transfer windows are aligned around the guest day, not left to collide with it.

Transitions

Every inter-island move is sequenced to feel smooth on the ground, at the dock, and in the air.

Contingency

Alternatives are quietly held in reserve so the experience never starts to feel fragile if timing shifts.

Coordinated across jet, launch, helicopter, villa, marina, and every invisible handoff that makes the trip feel secure.
Every stop held. A tailored sequence, timed so the guest experience feels uninterrupted from the first welcome to the final departure.

Mahé

The principal arrival island, where private aviation, marina departures, and hillside estates connect in the most seamless way.

Arrival Rhythm

Private aviation access with the easiest onward coordination for estates, marinas, and resort transfers.

Why It Matters

Ideal when the trip starts with business, a larger villa arrival, or the need for a polished first landing.

Best For

Guests who want the smoothest arrival chain before continuing deeper into the islands.
